channel.title: Django on Shafik
channel.description: Recent content in Django on Shafik

item.title: User Registration With Email Verification
item.description: Assume that I have a project named user_registration and it contains an app named accounts. At first, we need to configure our email server. So, got to user_registration/setting.py and write the follwoing lines: EMAIL_BACKEND = 'django.core.mail.backends.smtp.EmailBackend' MAILER_EMAIL_BACKEND = EMAIL_BACKEND EMAIL_HOST = 'your_mail_server' EMAIL_HOST_PASSWORD = 'your_password' EMAIL_HOST_USER = 'your_email' EMAIL_PORT = 465 EMAIL_USE_SSL = True DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL = EMAIL_HOST_USER To test above configuration work, open up the terminal and navigate to user_registration project and run following command:
